title: rottlera blumeana
intro: Rottlera blumeana, also known as the "Rottlera" or "Rottlera tree", is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rottlera blumeana include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Rottlera blumeana can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of conditions.
